days.label: Push Day — Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 — push day wasn't logged this week, no movement. This is the third consecutive week without a push day log. We still need 10/10/10 at RPE ≤ 7 before moving to 135. Full range of motion, touch the chest, controlled descent, drive through the heels. Log this session — no data means no progress.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 45 — push day wasn't logged again this week. Bumped here two weeks ago and we still haven't seen it in action. 30-degree incline, control the negative, full ROM. Aim for 8-10 per set at RPE 7-8. Log it.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 — push day wasn't logged. Last confirmed data was 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/8 two weeks back. Set 3 RPE was 8, need all three at RPE ≤ 7 to earn 35. Brace the core, don't lean into the reps, full lockout at the top. Log the session.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 12 — push day wasn't logged. Bumped to 12 two weeks ago after clean work at 10. Need 12/12/12 to earn a jump up. Slight bend in elbows, lead with the elbows, 2-second hold at the top, controlled negative. Log it.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 — push day wasn't logged. Two weeks ago you went 10/10/9 at RPE 7/7/9. Set 3 keeps slipping — a late-session fatigue issue. Need 10/10/10 at RPE ≤ 8 to earn 105. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, full lockout every rep. Manage your energy going into this one.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 — rotated in last week to hit the long head of the tricep, but push day wasn't logged so no data yet. Single DB, both hands, elbows tight to your head, lower slowly until you feel the stretch, full lockout. Aim for 10-12 at RPE 7-8. Log it this time.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps — 5 min

days.label: Pull Day — Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 185 — you logged this week: 10/9/8 at RPE 7/9/8. All sets are within the 8-10 range, but you're not hitting 10 across the board yet. Note: the plan called for 195 lbs but you trained at 185. Setting the target to 185 going forward to match where you're actually working. Hit 10/10/10 at RPE ≤ 8 here and we move to 195. Brace hard before you pull, lats tight, drive through the floor. Set 2 spiked to RPE 9 — watch your breathing and reset between reps.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 — you logged this week: 10/10/10 reps at RPE 7/7/7, but sets 2 and 3 dropped to 50 lbs. The reps are there but the weight wasn't consistent. Need all 3 sets at 55 lbs before we talk about moving up. This week: hold 55 for the full session. Pull to the hip, full second squeeze at the top, slow the negative. Log each side.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 — you logged this week: 10/10/8 at RPE 7/8/8. Sets 1 and 2 were clean but set 3 dropped to 8. Need 10/10/10 at RPE ≤ 8 to earn 110. Wide grip, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats at the bottom, no leaning back into a row. Reset your breathing between reps.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: Staying at 55 — you logged this week: 12/15/15 at RPE 7/7/7. Sets 2 and 3 were clean at 15, but set 1 only hit 12. Need all 3 sets at 15 reps to earn 65. This is a shoulder health movement — consistent form matters most. Rope at upper pulley, pull to your face, thumbs behind you at the finish. Get set 1 up to 15 this week.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 70 — you logged this week: 10/10/8 at RPE 9/8/8. Set 1 started at RPE 9 which is a high early cost, and set 3 fell to 8 reps. Need 10/10/10 at RPE ≤ 8 to earn 75. Full squeeze at the top, slow the negative, elbows pinned throughout. If set 1 is already at RPE 9, your form is likely breaking down early — tighten it up.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Pullover
exercises.notes: Keeping the pullover — last week you only logged 1 set (10 reps @ RPE 8). Need to complete all 3 sets this week. Lie perpendicular across the bench, DB behind your head, arms slightly bent. Lower slowly until you feel the stretch across your chest and lats, then pull back over. Aim for 10-12 at RPE 7. Log all 3 sets so we have a real baseline.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back — 5 min

days.label: Leg Day — Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 — legs day wasn't logged this week. Previous session had you at 9/8/8 at RPE 8/8/8 — within range but dropping reps on sets 2 and 3. Need 9-10 reps on all 3 sets at RPE ≤ 8 to earn 175. Below parallel, brace before you unrack, drive through the heels. Don't let the mid-session sets slip — that's where this is slowing down.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 145 — legs day wasn't logged this week. Previous session was 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 — clean across the board. Need to see that replicated at 145 before moving to 155. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins on the descent. Log it and earn 155.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 — legs day wasn't logged. Previously stuck at 10 reps when we need 12 to progress. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel. Intentionally push past 10 on every set this week — the reps are in there. Log each side.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: Staying at 75 — legs day wasn't logged. Previous session was 12/12/10 at RPE 7/7/8 — sets 1 and 2 were clean but set 3 dropped. Need 12/12/12 at RPE ≤ 8 to earn 85. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, hard squeeze at the top for a full second. Lock in that third set.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 — legs day wasn't logged. Previously went 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/9, which was a step back from an earlier 15/15/15. Need to get back to 12-15 reps before moving up. Controlled negative, full range of motion, don't rush the reps to compensate for fatigue. Log where you land.

exercises.name: Captain's Chair Knee Raise
exercises.notes: ROTATION IN — replacing hanging leg raises. The hanging leg raise was too steep a starting point (previous session: 8/6/5 at RPE 9/9/9). Captain's chair knee raise uses the same hip flexors and core with better control and no grip fatigue limiting you. Arms on the dip bar pads, raise your knees to chest height, control the descent — no swinging, no momentum. Aim for 10-12 reps at RPE 7-8. Build from a clean baseline here and we'll work back toward hanging leg raises once your core is stronger. Log each set.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors — 5 min
